title: hieracium praecox subsp. subortum
intro: Hieracium praecox subsp. subortum is a subspecies of the Hawkweed plant, belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory problems. Hieracium praecox subsp. subortum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, although its usage and efficacy should be verified by a medical professional.
